_note: Per-post image subjects for scripts/generate-blog-images.mjs. The script composes: subject + BASE_STYLE. No people, no text, no logos. Edit subjects freely; rerun with --only=<slug> --force to regenerate one.

posts.alt: A bright, freshly remodeled open living space in a Clark County home
posts.subject: a bright freshly remodeled open-concept living and kitchen space in a Pacific Northwest home, clean modern finishes, warm natural light through large windows, inviting and high-end

posts.subject: a beautifully finished open-concept remodel in a Pacific Northwest home, new wood and painted cabinetry, quartz countertops, fresh wide-plank flooring, warm natural daylight, premium and inviting
